name: Gaining adventures
description: This is fatfur adventure RPG, an RPG where you are the hero of the storythat is trying to save the world from a evil Demon, Every time you defeat a enemy you will get exp and it will be stored in your belly fatten you! Exp will be exchanged for stat points at resting points. The evil Demon is named "Pit," a black fluffy cocky and overconfident fat Demon king. Pit wants the world to be what he wants a fat and blubbery planet to rule over or at least toy with and play with the fat slaves and minions he has made. It's up to you save everyone from becoming a immobilized and slob fatty...I mean if you want you can let him but if you want everyone stuck as immobilized fat blobs including you then best fight him or something.
creator: Acedragofluff
